RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COBRA SOLUTIONS, INC. $252,065.19 PRINCIPAL, $29,488.18 INTEREST, $310.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $281,863.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COBRA SOLUTIONS, INC.

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO PERMIT LEVY ON FUNDS DEPOSITED WITH THE COURT -- RONALD K. LOSCH APPEAIRNG FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY. AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE AT THIS TIME THE VALIDITY OF THE CONFLICTING CLAIMS RELATING TO THE FUNDS DEPOSITED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PURSUANT TO ITS COMPLAINT IN INTERPLEADER AND WHAT PORTION, IF ANY, OF SAID FUNDS BELONG TO THE DEFENDANT COBRA SOLUTIONS. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
